title: New App release 1.4.0(5) is available
noticeMessage:
Added:
- Push notifications — get notified about new events even when the app is closed
- Check for App Update button in About App section to quickly verify if a newer version is available

Improved:
- URL format validation for source links

title: New study materials are available
noticeMessage:
Two new courses have been added to the curated collection:
 - SwiftUI Crypto App (Intermediate Level)
- SwiftUI + Firebase (Intermediate Level)

title: New App release 1.3.0(4) is available
noticeMessage:
Added:
- Materials can now be hidden and then moved to Deleted before permanent erase
- Hidden and deleted materials can be restored to Active in the new 'Archived Materials' view
- Notes in curated materials are now available for editing
- The 'Random' sorting option in the filter to display materials in shuffled order

Improved:
- Curated content migrated from GitHub JSON to Firestore Cloud for faster updates
- Search bar now supports keyboard language switching

Fixed:
- A potential crash caused by distantPast date handling in Firestore

title: New study materials are available
noticeMessage:
6 lessons added to the curated collection:

 - [weak self] (Intermediate)
 - @escaping closures (Intermediate)
 - Download images with @escaping, Combine and Async/Await (Intermediate)
 - Struct vs Class vs Actor, Value vs Reference Types, Stack vs Heap (Intermediate)
 - Protocols (Advanced)
 - Dependency Injection (Advanced)

title: New App update 1.2.1(3) is available
noticeMessage:
- Added the 'Original' sorting option in the filter to display materials in the default order
- Improved overall performance
- Various UX enhancements

title: New study materials are available
noticeMessage:
Two new courses added to the curated collection:
 - SwiftUI Continued Learning (Intermediate)
- Swift Concurrency (Intermediate)

title: New App update 1.1.2(2) is available
noticeMessage:
- Improved cross-device cloud sync
- Added sorting option for materials (newest/oldest)
- Minor UX enhancements
